penalties.description: Task not completed within maximum time of 180 seconds. Loop tail was not cut inside the trainer.

reasoning: The video shows clear loop introduction around the middle appendage and positioning phases. The loop appears to be placed around the marked location on the appendage. However, the task is incomplete as the loop tail is never cut inside the trainer, which is a required completion step. Since maximum time appears to be reached without completion, this results in an incomplete_task penalty and zero score.
